data.description:
Each target suffers @DATA[key.status]. Each target also loses Resistance to @DATA[key.typeLocal] damage until the start of your next turn, and cannot gain Resistance to that damage type.

Target Suffers: @EFFECT[@DATA[key.status]]
Target Gains: @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.e55RS2mwta54CqMp], @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.vyykMV9QXsiWrlc6], @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.Ntm4uco2lLUdRXT9], @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.YWn3z0Wq0lunAtWU], @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.gHzrl6kqjqLgoE5b], @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.gcgo90l4f6EVFf2O], @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.ZfWTfBKIH8iAxOwN], @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.BF3hqaBAqY6LnCWC], or @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.s4vj7Z41rWYs1JH2]
